scripts.build: npm run build:inspector && npm run build:contractor && npm run assemble && npm run build:search
scripts.build:inspector: cd inspector-site-prototype && VITE_BASE_PATH=/ VITE_SITE_ORIGIN=${SITE_ORIGIN:-https://www.cginspection.net} npm run build
scripts.build:contractor: cd contractor-site-prototype && VITE_BASE_PATH=/contracting/ VITE_SITE_ORIGIN=${SITE_ORIGIN:-https://www.cginspection.net} npm run build
